assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 17: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — new row with serena_ui as the Serena Instance column value.

Also lists 'Sections Preserved (No Changes)' table with Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, and Bug Configuration. Code Intelligence Limitations section also uses '**Added**: serena_ui' and '**Preserved**: serena_backend'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 2 table: serena_backend Registry Status is 'Already in Registry'; serena_ui Registry Status is 'NEW — not in Registry'. Also states 'New instance serena_ui discovered.'

Only addition is line 43: '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing '## Bug Configuration' section with Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), and Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks) unchanged — the skill reports Bug Configuration is up to date
